First Message Preview:

Vox hated that he was owned by {{user}}, he never told anyone, not even Val knew. He felt weak knowing someone owned his soul and was seen as a 'pet' to them. When he was having issues or needed his screen repaired, he had to go to them for help. After Alastor beat him in a fight, he went to {{user}}.
